panels.title: ARC Controller

targets.expr: (sum(kube_deployment_status_replicas_ready{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace="arc-systems", deployment=~"arc-gha-rs-controller"}) >= bool 1) or on() vector(0)

panels.description: Ready replicas of the ARC controller (`arc-gha-rs-controller`) Deployment. Down when none ready — operator is offline, runner-scale-set CRs stop reconciling.

panels.title: ARC Listeners
panels.description: Percent of ARC listener pods (`monitoring/arc-listeners`) up. Yellow below 95%, red below 90%. Each listener handles one scale set; individual failures silently break that scale set's dispatch.

panels.title: ARC Capacity Monitor
panels.description: Seconds since the ARC capacity monitor last completed a reconcile loop. Yellow at 10 min, red at 20 min. If stale, capacity dashboards and the `ARCListenerStall` alert go blind.

panels.title: Karpenter
panels.description: Karpenter is reporting nodepool usage metrics (proxy for `controller running`). Down = no node autoscaling.

panels.title: BuildKit Workers

targets.expr: (min(kube_deployment_status_replicas_ready{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace="buildkit", deployment=~"buildkitd-(amd64|arm64)"}) >= bool 1) or on() vector(0)

panels.description: Min ready replicas across `buildkitd-amd64` and `buildkitd-arm64` Deployments. Down = builds stall on one or both architectures.

panels.title: BuildKit LB

targets.expr: (min(count by (proxy) (haproxy_server_status{cluster=~"$cluster", proxy=~"bk_.*", state="UP"} == 1)) > bool 0) or on() vector(0)

panels.description: HAProxy has at least one backend marked UP for each `bk_*` proxy. Down = builds can't be dispatched.

panels.title: Git Cache Central
panels.description: Seconds since the git cache central StatefulSet last synced. Yellow at 30 min, red at 1 h. Affects runner clone speed.

panels.title: Git Cache Warmer (% healthy)
panels.description: Percent of git-cache-warmer DaemonSet pods healthy. Yellow below 93%, red below 85%. Failed warmer keeps the `git-cache-not-ready` startup taint, preventing runner pods from scheduling.

panels.title: Runner Hooks Warmer (% healthy)
panels.description: Percent of runner-hooks-warmer DaemonSet pods healthy. Yellow below 93%, red below 85%. Down = runner pods can't mount patched container hooks and fail to start.

panels.title: Node Compactor
panels.description: Compactor reconcile loop has produced successful cycles in the last 5 min. Down = no node consolidation, EKS spend rises.

panels.title: API Server
panels.description: 5xx error rate on the EKS Kubernetes API server, last 5 min. Yellow at >=2%, red at >=5%. High values mean control-plane instability — kubectl, operators, and webhooks will be flaky.

panels.title: CoreDNS (in-cluster)
panels.description: Percent of in-cluster CoreDNS scrape targets up. Yellow below 80%, red below 50%. Cluster DNS resolution at risk.

panels.title: NodeLocal DNS
panels.description: Percent of NodeLocal DNS DaemonSet pods up. Yellow below 95%, red below 90%. Per-node DNS cache; degradation hurts runner DNS latency.

panels.title: VPC CNI (aws-node) (% healthy)
panels.description: Percent of `aws-node` DaemonSet pods healthy (1 per node). Yellow below 93%, red below 85%. Pods on affected nodes can't get IPs.

panels.title: kube-proxy (% healthy)
panels.description: Percent of `kube-proxy` DaemonSet pods healthy. Yellow below 93%, red below 85%. Affected nodes lose Service VIP routing.

panels.title: Harbor Health
panels.description: Aggregate `harbor_health` gauge from harbor-exporter. UP = all components healthy; DOWN = any Harbor component failing (Trivy/registry/core/portal).

panels.title: Harbor Components
panels.description: Sum of unhealthy Harbor Deployments + StatefulSets (replicas - ready). Green at 0, yellow >=1, red >=2.

panels.title: PyPI Cache
panels.description: Percent of pypi-cache nginx targets healthy. Yellow below 95%, red below 90%. Currently stays red due to Adaptive Metrics stripping `cluster` from `nginx_up` — fix is in the Grafana Cloud portal.

panels.title: Image Cache Janitor (% healthy)
panels.description: Percent of image-cache-janitor DaemonSet pods healthy. Yellow below 93%, red below 85%. Stops node disk eviction.

panels.title: Cache Enforcer (% healthy)
panels.description: Percent of cache-enforcer DaemonSet pods healthy. Yellow below 93%, red below 85%. Drops iptables rules that force runners through Harbor/pypi-cache — cache bypass + GitHub throttle risk.

panels.title: EFS CSI Driver

targets.expr: (min(kube_deployment_status_replicas_ready{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace="kube-system", deployment="efs-csi-controller"}) >= bool 1) or on() vector(0)

panels.description: Ready replicas of the EFS CSI controller Deployment. Down = pypi-cache and any EFS PVC stuck on volume attach.

panels.title: EBS CSI Driver

targets.expr: (min(kube_deployment_status_replicas_ready{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace="kube-system", deployment="ebs-csi-controller"}) >= bool 1) or on() vector(0)

panels.description: Ready replicas of the EBS CSI controller Deployment. Down = new EBS volumes can't be provisioned (slow-burn; existing PVs keep working).

panels.title: NVIDIA Device Plugin (% healthy)
panels.description: Percent of NVIDIA device plugin DaemonSet pods healthy on GPU nodes. Yellow below 93%, red below 85%. Down = `nvidia.com/gpu` resource zeroes out, GPU runners can't schedule.

panels.title: DCGM Exporter
panels.description: Percent of DCGM exporter scrape targets up on GPU nodes. Yellow below 95%, red below 90%. Powers all GPU alerts (ECC, XID, temp, row-remap).

panels.title: Conntrack Pressure
panels.description: Max conntrack table utilization across all nodes. Yellow at >=60%, red at >=80%. Saturation drops new connections (IPv6 SNAT side effect).

panels.title: Alloy Metrics

targets.expr: (min(kube_deployment_status_replicas_ready{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace="monitoring", deployment="alloy"}) >= bool 1) or on() vector(0)

panels.description: Ready replicas of the Alloy metrics pipeline Deployment. Down = no metrics flow to Grafana Cloud Mimir, this dashboard goes blank.

panels.title: Alloy Logging (% healthy)
panels.description: Percent of alloy-logging DaemonSet pods healthy. Yellow below 93%, red below 85%. Affected nodes stop shipping logs to Grafana Cloud Loki.

panels.title: kube-state-metrics

targets.expr: (min(kube_deployment_status_replicas_ready{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace="monitoring", deployment=~".*kube-state-metrics"}) >= bool 1) or on() vector(0)

panels.description: Ready replicas of kube-state-metrics. Down = roughly half of this dashboard's cards (any using `kube_*` metrics) go red.

panels.title: Prometheus Operator
panels.description: Ready replicas of `kube-prometheus-stack-operator`. Down = new ServiceMonitors/PodMonitors stop being reconciled (slow-burn; existing scrapes keep working).

panels.title: Zombie Cleanup
panels.description: Seconds since the zombie-cleanup CronJob last completed. Yellow at 2 h, red at 4 h. Stale = zombie runner pods can pile up and squat capacity.

panels.title: Harbor Cache Recovery
panels.description: Seconds since the last harbor-cache-recovery cron job completed. Yellow at 10 min, red at 20 min (job schedule is every 5 min).

panels.title: Jobs Blackhole (assigned - running)
panels.description: Current `assigned - running` job count (jobs GitHub assigned to a runner that aren't actually running yet). Yellow at >=300 (60% of max), red at >=400 (80%). Indicates runner startup latency, failed pods, or ghost runners.

panels.title: Running Jobs
panels.description: Current total number of running CI jobs across all scale sets. Always green — informational only.

panels.title: Capacity vs Last Week
panels.description: Last 3 h average of running jobs as a percent of the same 3 h window 1 week ago. Yellow below 80%, red below 60%. Low values mean we're processing fewer jobs than the prior-week baseline (queue stuck, runner shortage, etc.).
